scoring_caveat: PopQA heldout contains-match is alias-permissive: the RAW panel (popqa_blend_heldout.jsonl) keeps up to 69 aliases / multi-word answers, which can inflate fact_rate via spurious matches. Use this TIGHT panel (<=3 short aliases, <=2-word answers) as the PRIMARY FACT-003H transfer metric; report the loose panel only as a permissive secondary read.
